meta.name: Mateo Sleep Reference (total sleep by age)
meta.source: AAP-endorsed AASM consensus recommendations on sleep duration (0-5y), as summarised in the First 2,000 Days journey document. Total sleep per 24 hours, including naps.
meta.notes: Typical ranges for orientation, NOT targets or a diagnosis. Every baby is different — a settled, thriving baby a little outside the range is usually fine. Share persistent concerns with your pediatrician.

bands.label: Newborn
bands.note: In short stretches across day and night — a fragmented pattern is completely normal.

bands.label: Infant
bands.note: Including naps; longer night stretches gradually emerge.

bands.label: Toddler
bands.note: Usually across a night plus one or two daytime naps.

bands.label: Preschool
bands.note: Often a single nap that drops away over time.
